title: Senior Investment Banker at Federal Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Federal Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!
